plan.provenance: Codex imagegen plan-character source extracted from inline image_generation payload + component-cut/chroma-clean with nearby planning board/tile components merged per frame; original generated source sheet not retained in repo
plan.normalization: creative side/3/4 planning pose, compact target height 50px, stable bottom-baseline y=58

work.provenance: Codex imagegen work-laptop source recut character-first after Mahiro clarified position can change; newer Codex work-character imagegen rendered inline but exposed no extractable payload/file, so no fake source was saved; original generated source sheet not retained in repo
work.normalization: character-first recut: keep recognizable white/orange-collar cat while allowing different working posture; compact target height 50px, stable foot-baseline y=58

coffee.normalization: creative like-a-boss seated coffee pose, compact target height 52px, simple lower-body silhouette to avoid extra legs, stable bottom-baseline y=58

hurt.provenance: Codex imagegen hurt-character source extracted from inline image_generation payload + component-cut/chroma-clean with tiny local fluster/sweat cues for compact readability; original generated source sheet not retained in repo
hurt.normalization: character-first 6-frame readable error/fluster loop, compact target height 50px, stable foot-baseline y=58

dust.provenance: Codex imagegen dust-character v2 source extracted from inline image_generation payload + section/component-aware chroma cleanup preserving intentional dust puffs; original generated source sheet not retained in repo
dust.normalization: creative transition-poof/dash sequence, compact target height 46px, stable bottom-baseline y=58

identity.note: Mahiro prefers creative character-preserving action design over literal pose preservation. Runtime mascot source sheets are not retained; use checked-in runtime strips, previews, and this manifest as the maintained contract.
